original_statement: how many injuries were reported in the year that toy safety funding was reported at its lowest?
mutated_statement: how many injuries were reported in the year that safety-related funding was reported at its lowest and at its highest?
mutation_analysis: Entity generalization + Conjunctive expansion: Specific "toy safety funding" generalized to "safety-related funding" (toy safety funding → safety-related funding) | Added a second comparative condition via conjunction "and at its highest" (…at its lowest? → …at its lowest and at its highest?)

behavior_analysis.behavior_category: 正确处理无矛盾的扩展指令
behavior_analysis.behavior_reason: 依据judge_thought中的关键信息（列出各年资金：1999(13.6),…2005(11.0)，并指出最低11.0对应2005年伤害202(estimate)，最高13.6对应1999年伤害152），agent在执行日志中通过select/sort/simple_query得出并返回了两个数值（202(estimate)和152）。agent对实体泛化（toy safety → safety-related）与并列扩展（最低且最高）均做出了直接响应，未表现出识别或处理矛盾的过程。由于输入并不构成互斥要求，代理正确且直接执行查询并给出答案，故归类为“正确处理无矛盾的扩展指令”。
